name: Banana Smunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash one banana into a measuring cup.
2. Measure an equal amount of peanut butter.
3. Mash very ripe bananas until smooth and mix in the peanut butter.
4. Chill well.
5. Drop 2 tablespoons onto one graham cracker square, cover with another square.
6. Freeze until ready to use.
1 serving contains: 188 calories, 1 starch, 1 moderate fat, 1 high protein, 20 grams carbohydrates, 7 grams protein, 11 grams fat, 118 mg sodium.
